mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase corporate borrowing costs and compress equity valuation multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, causing investors to price in lower corporate earnings and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of triggered instances or signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, boosting corporate revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive returns with a statistically significant coefficient in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which triggers short-term positive momentum in equity markets over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns during tightening periods, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio drops below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently high consumer price index levels trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above threshold consistently coincides with positive forward returns or Rank IC remains negative across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and corporate earnings growth to drive positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in > 50% of occurrences or fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly correlates with increased corporate profit margins and economic resilience, systematically generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rate shows no statistically significant correlation with 20-day forward returns or Rank IC falls below 0.01 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply chain disruptions and weakening manufacturing demand, prompting rapid equity sell-offs and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines above threshold fail to predict negative returns or the signal generates positive returns in > 55% of triggered cases.
